name: worldcoin
description: Filter human-critical workflows using proof-of-human logic. Designed for identity-sensitive commercial decisions, anti-bot gating, and real-human-required checkpoints.
author: agenticio

capabilities.human_trust_design: Design proof-of-human style trust layers for digital workflows
capabilities.abuse_risk_classification: Classify bot, duplicate, and fake-participation risks
capabilities.verification_threshold_design: Recommend the right level of human-verification friction
capabilities.workflow_gating: Decide where stronger human gating is worth the cost
